title: Lesson 378
transcript: Section 1.5, understand requirements for investigation types. We're not actually gonna talk about any of this right now. So here's why. For some reason, ISC2 made the decision to put this little tiny section here on the different types of investigations here in domain one, which from a teaching perspective, just doesn't really make sense. Much later in this course, in domain seven, at the start of domain seven, we're gonna talk about forensic investigations and digital forensics, and we're gonna go through how you go about conducting an investigation. And once we've talked about all of that, then it makes sense to talk about the different types of investigations, criminal investigations, civil investigations, administrative investigations, regulatory investigations, et cetera. That's what we're going to, that's what this section is about. And we're going to talk about all this. There's a little video on the different types of investigations in domain seven. So see you there.
